# ADR-CXP-004: Finite State Machine for Invoice Lifecycle

**Status:** Accepted
**Date:** 2026-06-17
**Functionality:** CXP-GHCopilot-Sonnet46 – Cuentas por Pagar
**Generated by:** GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6

---

## Context

The CXP system manages invoices through a defined sequence of states driven by role-based actor actions. Business rules require strict control over which state transitions are valid and full traceability of all state changes. DDA-001 mandates a state machine-based lifecycle.

## Decision

Implement a **Finite State Machine (FSM)** for the invoice lifecycle in a dedicated domain service (`invoice-lifecycle-api`), with an immutable state transition history and audit log persisted in append-only PostgreSQL tables.

## State Machine Definition

| State | Description | Terminal |
|---|---|---|
| PENDING | Invoice registered, awaiting approval | No |
| APPROVED | Approved; eligible for payment scheduling | No |
| REJECTED | Rejected by manager | Yes |
| SCHEDULED | Payment date set; awaiting execution | No |
| PAID | Payment executed and bank-confirmed | Yes |
| CANCELLED | Cancelled before payment | Yes |

## Valid Transitions

| From | To | Actor | Rule |
|---|---|---|---|
| PENDING | APPROVED | MANAGER | BR-004 |
| PENDING | REJECTED | MANAGER | BR-004 |
| PENDING | CANCELLED | ANALYST/MANAGER | – |
| APPROVED | SCHEDULED | TREASURER | BR-006 |
| APPROVED | CANCELLED | MANAGER | – |
| SCHEDULED | PAID | SYSTEM (webhook) | – |
| SCHEDULED | CANCELLED | MANAGER | – |

Invalid transition attempts return HTTP 422 with `INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION` error code.

## Rationale

- Eliminates invalid state mutations at the domain level; no business layer can skip states
- Immutable `state_transitions` table provides full audit trail for SOX / ISO 27001
- Decoupled domain service (`invoice-lifecycle-api`) encapsulates all transition logic — easier to test and audit independently
- Aligns with BIAN AccountsReceivable `AccountsReceivableProcedure` control record pattern

## Alternatives Considered

| Alternative | Reason Rejected |
|---|---|
| Status field updated ad-hoc in business layer | No transition validation; risk of invalid states; no audit trail |
| Event sourcing full implementation | Adds operational complexity (event store, projections) beyond current scope |
| Flags per state (is_approved, is_paid) | Ambiguous combined states; harder to reason about lifecycle |

## Consequences

- **Positive:** Strong lifecycle integrity; all invalid transitions rejected at domain level
- **Positive:** Full immutable audit trail satisfying SOX / ISO 27001
- **Positive:** Clear separation of domain concerns
- **Negative:** Additional service to maintain (invoice-lifecycle-api)
- **Negative:** Transition rule changes require coordinated deployment
